options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.
WARNING: Experimental feature; issues and instability are to be expected. Only Power Competition implemented.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines World completion condition
Mew: Beat Mew (Default)
postgame: Complete the postgame Prisma check (needs all friends)

options.name: randomize_attraction_entrances
options.description: Randomize attraction entrances among themselves.

options.name: randomize_fast_travel_entrances
options.description: Randomize fast travel entrances among themselves.

options.name: randomize_treehouse_gates_entrances
options.description: Randomize Treehouse gate entrances among themselves.

options.name: randomize_general_entrances
options.description: Randomize general entrances among themselves (e.g., Meadow Zone Main Area → Meadow Zone Venusaur Area).

options.name: mix_entrance_pools
options.description:
Mix all enabled randomized entrances into a single pool, except attraction entrances.
WARNING: Mixing Entrance Pool is still experimental; expect breaking issues.

options.name: power_starting_mode
options.description:
Determines which Power Items are added to the starting inventory.

For fully custom starting Powers, set this to 'None' and use the StartInventoryPool option instead

Full: Start with all available Power Items
None: Start with no Power Items
Vanilla: Start with one Thunderbolt and one Dash (default)
Thunderbolt: Start with one Thunderbolt
Dash: Start with one Dash
IronTail: Start with one Iron Tail
Randomize: Starting Power Items are randomized

options.name: start_fast_travel
options.description:
Determines how Fast Travel Items are shuffled into the pool
None: Start with no Fast Travel Items (Default)
One: Start with one random Fast Travel Item
All: Start with all Fast Travel Items

options.name: num_required_battle_count
options.description: Select the number of required consecutive Wins to challenge Battle count Pokemon e.g. Scyther

options.name: num_required_prisma_count_skygarden
options.description: Select the number of required Prisma Shards to enter Skygarden with piplup in the Treehouse

options.name: in_zone_road_blocks
options.description:
Additional Road Blocks inside the Zones e.g. Beach Zone Bridges as items. Road Block Items are precollected when
this option is deactivated.

options.name: harder_enemy_ai
options.description:
Pokémon always have the harder AI in Power Competition.
WARNING: Generation currently does not account in detail for the harder enemy AI, which can lead to frustrating
gameplay.

options.name: unlock_fast_travel_with_taxi_stop
options.description:
Unlocks Fast Travel to reachable zones when interacting with Taxi Stops beside Drifblim. This option is
automatically disabled when the Randomized Fast Travel Entrances option is enabled.

options.name: show_client_text_ingame
options.description: Toggles whether client text is displayed in-game.

options.name: fps_enhancement_patch
options.description: Unlocks frame rate up to 60 FPS

options.name: each_zone
options.description: Pokemon that are in multiple Zones become additional Locations. e.g. Bonsly (Meadow, Cavern, Magma Zone)

options.name: remove_battle_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Battle Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be used for
gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_chase_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Chase Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be used for
gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_quiz_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Quiz Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be used for
gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_hide_and_seek_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Hide and Seek Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be
used for gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_errand_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Errand Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be used for
gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_misc_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Miscellaneous Power Competition Locations. They will no longer send items but can still be
used for gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_legendary_pokemon_power_comp_locations
options.description:
Remove Legendary Pokemon Power Competition Locations e.g. Celebi. They will no longer send items but can still be
used for gaining berries.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_power_training_locations
options.description:
Remove Power Training Locations (e.g., Thunderbolt Upgrade Training at Electabuzz).
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_attraction_locations
options.description:
Remove Record clearing Attraction Locations. (each Pokemon Record is a Location)
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_attraction_prisma_locations
options.description:
Remove Attraction Prisma clear locations. (Vanilla first time beating Attraction Goal)
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: remove_pokemon_unlock_locations
options.description:
Remove Pokemon Unlock Locations. e.g. Caterpie Tree, Shroomish Crate etc.
WARNING: Removing too many location types may cause an OptionError if there aren't enough locations for progressive items.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Haunted Zone Mansion Gem Doors Unlock

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Haunted Zone Mansion Gem Doors Unlock

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Haunted Zone Mansion Gem Doors Unlock

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Haunted Zone Mansion Gem Doors Unlock

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
